'''竏營-dh-l-k''' ('''kazadhlekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:outbehave|outbehave]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-dh-l-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:outbehave|outbehave]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏營-dh-l-k
|-
! Lemma
| kazadhlekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizadhlekoko|thizadhlekoko]] || [[word:jizadhlekoko|jizadhlekoko]] || [[word:shizadhlekoko|shizadhlekoko]] || [[word:kizadhlekoko|kizadhlekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzadhlekoko|thuthuzadhlekoko]] || [[word:jujuzadhlekoko|jujuzadhlekoko]] || [[word:shushuzadhlekoko|shushuzadhlekoko]] || [[word:kukuzadhlekoko|kukuzadhlekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzadhlekoko|thuzadhlekoko]] || [[word:juzadhlekoko|juzadhlekoko]] || [[word:shuzadhlekoko|shuzadhlekoko]] || [[word:kuzadhlekoko|kuzadhlekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzadhlekoko|thuzadhlekoko]] || [[word:juzadhlekoko|juzadhlekoko]] || [[word:shuzadhlekoko|shuzadhlekoko]] || [[word:kuzadhlekoko|kuzadhlekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezadhlekoko|thezadhlekoko]] || [[word:jezadhlekoko|jezadhlekoko]] || [[word:shezadhlekoko|shezadhlekoko]] || [[word:kezadhlekoko|kezadhlekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozadhlekoko|thothozadhlekoko]] || [[word:jojozadhlekoko|jojozadhlekoko]] || [[word:shoshozadhlekoko|shoshozadhlekoko]] || [[word:kokozadhlekoko|kokozadhlekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozadhlekoko|thozadhlekoko]] || [[word:jozadhlekoko|jozadhlekoko]] || [[word:shozadhlekoko|shozadhlekoko]] || [[word:kozadhlekoko|kozadhlekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozadhlekoko|thozadhlekoko]] || [[word:jozadhlekoko|jozadhlekoko]] || [[word:shozadhlekoko|shozadhlekoko]] || [[word:kozadhlekoko|kozadhlekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦzadhlekoko|thﾃｦzadhlekoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦzadhlekoko|jﾃｦzadhlekoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦzadhlekoko|shﾃｦzadhlekoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦzadhlekoko|kﾃｦzadhlekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazadhlekoko|thathazadhlekoko]] || [[word:jajazadhlekoko|jajazadhlekoko]] || [[word:shashazadhlekoko|shashazadhlekoko]] || [[word:kakazadhlekoko|kakazadhlekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazadhlekoko|thazadhlekoko]] || [[word:jazadhlekoko|jazadhlekoko]] || [[word:shazadhlekoko|shazadhlekoko]] || [[word:kazadhlekoko|kazadhlekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazadhlekoko|thazadhlekoko]] || [[word:jazadhlekoko|jazadhlekoko]] || [[word:shazadhlekoko|shazadhlekoko]] || [[word:kazadhlekoko|kazadhlekoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shazadhlekithi|shazadhlekithi]] || [[word:shazadhlekiji|shazadhlekiji]] || [[word:shazadhlekishi|shazadhlekishi]] || [[word:shazadhlekiki|shazadhlekiki]]

|}
